items.title: No behavioral surface — dark engine, zero callers; verified by Layer 1 unit tests
items.expected: Unit suite covers DiD/ITS math; no runtime path exists until later calibration/wiring
items.evidence: Read-only verify: ctrAttributionMath.ts imports only config/metricActions (no DB/Express/fetch/env/console); git grep across src/ (excluding the engine + its test) finds zero importers/callers — only a doc-comment mention. Layer-1 suite present: src/__tests__/attribution.month-simulation.test.ts (37 sim cases + adversary/mutation guards).
items.notes: Dark by design; no api/ui/cli surface until a separate gated calibration task wires it.
